# alreadyFetching

**Type Property**

Item thumbnail request is being serviced.

## Declaration

```swift
static var alreadyFetching: ICReturnThumbnailError.Code { get }
```

## Error Codes

- **canceled**: Item thumbnail request has been canceled.
- **invalid**: Item thumbnail request completed with invalid result.
- **notAvailable**: Item does not have thumbnail available.
- **ICReturnThumbnailError.Code**

items.description: Item thumbnail request has been canceled.
items.name: canceled

items.description: Item thumbnail request completed with invalid result.
